scripts.vercel-build: pnpm run apply:runtime && pnpm exec mocha --file tests/setup-env.cjs "tests/**/*.js" --pass-with-no-tests && pnpm run build
scripts.apply:runtime: pnpm run apply:last9 && pnpm run apply:creator-music && pnpm run apply:creator-generation && pnpm run apply:formulas && pnpm run apply:ecosystem && pnpm run apply:ai-integrations && pnpm run apply:reference-intelligence && pnpm run apply:database-management && pnpm run apply:business-control-plane && pnpm run apply:brand && pnpm run apply:db-query-contract && pnpm run apply:paid-launch && pnpm run apply:organization-setup && pnpm run apply:payload-size-guard && pnpm run apply:premium-access && pnpm run apply:premium-ui-final && pnpm run apply:cinematic-quick-access
scripts.db:push: pnpm run db:patch-triggers && pnpm exec supabase db push
scripts.db:push:all: pnpm run db:patch-triggers && pnpm exec supabase db push --include-all
scripts.lint: eslint server.js api routes lib scripts tests public --ignore-pattern "frontend/**" --ignore-pattern "my-app/**" --ignore-pattern "sonara-industries/**" --ignore-pattern "**/node_modules/**" --ignore-pattern "**/.next/**"
scripts.verify:launch: pnpm run apply:runtime && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run scan:client-secrets && pnpm run lint && pnpm run smoke:routes && pnpm run verify:db && pnpm run verify:config && pnpm run verify:api && pnpm run verify:open-source
scripts.workers:smoke: echo Optional Creator Studio GPU workers are disabled by default and use /v1/jobs when configured
